idea-plugin.name: Stan Language Support
idea-plugin.description:
Syntax highlighting support for the Stan statistical modeling language.
Stan is a probabilistic programming language for Bayesian statistical inference, full Bayesian statistical inference with MCMC sampling, approximate Bayesian inference with variational inference, and penalized maximum likelihood estimation.

Features:
  • Syntax highlighting for keywords, types, built-in functions, and distributions
  • Comment highlighting (// and /* */ and # styles)
  • Number and string literal highlighting
  • Customizable colors via Settings → Editor → Color Scheme → Stan

action.description: Create a new Stan model file
